description: Firefox downloads parser reads places.sqlite moz_annos and emits BrowserEvent per download
steps: Query: SELECT p.url, a.content AS dest_path, a.dateAdded FROM moz_annos a JOIN moz_places p ON a.place_id = p.id JOIN moz_anno_attributes attr ON a.anno_attribute_id = attr.id WHERE attr.name = 'downloads/destinationFileURI' ORDER BY a.dateAdded ASC
Test factory creates moz_places, moz_anno_attributes (with id=1, name='downloads/destinationFileURI'), moz_annos tables
Test: parse_single_ff_download — artifact=Downloads, browser=Firefox, attrs[url] correct, ts_ns = dateAdded * 1_000
